mapper.select: SELECT dp.saving_product_id AS savingId, dp.kor_co_nm AS bankName, dp.fin_prdt_nm AS savingName, MAX(do.intr_rate) AS basicRate, MAX(do.intr_rate2) AS maxRate, fc.company_image AS companyImage, dp.max_limit AS maxLimit FROM saving_product dp JOIN saving_option do ON dp.fin_prdt_cd = do.fin_prdt_cd JOIN financial_companies fc ON dp.fin_id = fc.fin_id WHERE dp.persona_id = #{personaId} GROUP BY dp.saving_product_id
